overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking along a wooden waterfront path during a dramatic red sunset. A stone castle tower stands silhouetted against the crimson sky across the calm lake waters.

events.description: Geralt finishes climbing stairs and continues onto level wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing weathered wooden stairs and transitioning to a waterfront walkway, carrying two swords on his back

entered.detail: weathered wooden stairs leading up from cobblestone to the walkway level
simple wooden fence railing along the right side overlooking the water
tall stone tower with pointed roof silhouetted against the red sky across the lake
calm water surface reflecting the dramatic red and orange sunset clouds
evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
distant mountain silhouettes forming the horizon line

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt ascending wooden stairs at sunset. The sky burns crimson overhead, and across the calm lake waters, a stone castle tower stands in silhouette against the dramatic clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden waterfront promenade with lakeside view

events.description: Geralt slows walking pace and comes to a stop to observe the sunset view

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the waterfront walkway before slowing to a stop, looking out toward the castle and red sky

notable_agents.action: shirtless man leaning against the wooden railing looking out at the lake

entered.detail: rustic wooden house with red roof visible through the trees
stack of wooden barrels placed near the railing
simple wooden bench facing the water

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the wooden promenade, Geralt passes a shirtless man standing by the railing and wooden barrels near a rustic building. The path offers an open view of the lake and distant castle tower under the burning red sky, and Geralt eventually slows to a stop to take in the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a waterfront promenade that transitions from an ascent to a contemplative pause under a dramatic sunset. It begins with Geralt climbing wooden stairs as the sky burns crimson, framing a silhouetted stone castle tower across the calm lake waters. As he continues along the wooden path, the camera passes a shirtless man by the railing and rustic barrels near a building, maintaining an open view of the distant tower. The scene then shifts as Geralt slows his pace, eventually coming to a complete stop to take in the expansive view of the burning red sky and the still water.
